# `api.lookup.get_ppc_campaigns`

> `GET /lookup/PPCCampaigns` — ACPortal

**Python**

```python
api.lookup.get_ppc_campaigns() -> list[PPCCampaign]
```

**CLI**

```bash
ab lookup get_ppc_campaigns
```

GET /lookup/PPCCampaigns

## Response

Returns a list of `List[PPCCampaign]`.

| Field | Type | Required | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `id` | `Optional[int]` | no | Campaign ID |
| `name` | `Optional[str]` | no | Campaign name |
